source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
To meet the New Year day 2008, Basil put on a T-shirt with <image1> on it, and stood in front of a mirror on his hands, with his feet up. What number did Nick standing on his feet behind Basil see in the mirror?
<image2>

The prompt involves spatial relations between Basil, Nick, and the mirror rather than a single direct lookup.
Question text length and phrasing indicate a composed reasoning task rather than a one-step recognition task.
